debug_info.goal:
case hf₂
r : ℝ
f : ℂ → ℂ
hr : r ≠ 0
h : Meromorphic f
h₂ : 0 < meromorphicOrderAt f 0
f2 :
  circleAverage (fun a => logCounting f (↑a) r + log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x => f x - a) 0‖) 0 1 =
    circleAverage (fun a => circleAverage (fun x => log ‖f x - a‖) 0 r + logCounting f ⊤ r) 0 1
⊢ CircleIntegrable (fun a => log ‖meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x => f x - a) 0‖) 0 1

proof:
apply ContinuousOn.circleIntegrable'
    apply (continuousOn_const (c := 0)).congr
    intro a ha
    rw [mem_sphere_zero_iff_norm] at ha
    have ha₀ : a ≠ 0 := by aesop
    have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0 = -a := by
      rw [show (fun x ↦ f x - a) = (fun _ ↦ -a) + f by ext; simp; ring]
      apply (MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt (h 0) ?_).trans meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_const
      have : meromorphicOrderAt (fun _ ↦ -a : ℂ → ℂ) 0 = 0 := by
        refine (MeromorphicNFAt.meromorphicOrderAt_eq_zero_iff ?_).mpr ?_
        · exact meromorphicNFAt_iff_analyticAt_or.mpr (Or.inl analyticAt_const)
        · simp [ha₀]
      rwa [this]
    simp [this, ha, norm_neg, Real.log_one]
successful_attempts:
apply ContinuousOn.circleIntegrable'
    apply (continuousOn_const (c := 0)).congr
    intro a ha
    rw [mem_sphere_zero_iff_norm] at ha
    have ha₀ : a ≠ 0 := by aesop
    have : meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt (fun x ↦ f x - a) 0 = -a := by
      rw [show (fun x ↦ f x - a) = (fun _ ↦ -a) + f by ext; simp; ring]
      apply (MeromorphicAt.meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_add_eq_left_of_lt (h 0) ?_).trans meromorphicTrailingCoeffAt_const
      have : meromorphicOrderAt (fun _ ↦ -a : ℂ → ℂ) 0 = 0 := by
        refine (MeromorphicNFAt.meromorphicOrderAt_eq_zero_iff ?_).mpr ?_
        · exact meromorphicNFAt_iff_analyticAt_or.mpr (Or.inl analyticAt_const)
        · simp [ha₀]
      rwa [this]
    simp [this, ha, norm_neg, Real.log_one]
